activities_projects.title: Land Revenue Concept
activities_projects.objective: Understand the meaning of land revenue
steps: Write the meaning of land revenue
Write who collected it during British rule
Explain why it was important for the British government
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of land revenue

activities_projects.title: Permanent Settlement Chart
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the Permanent Settlement system
steps: Write the year Permanent Settlement was introduced
Write the name of the Governor-General who introduced it
Write two features of this system
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises the main features of Permanent Settlement

activities_projects.title: Zamindar Role Activity
steps: Write who the zamindars were
Explain their duty in collecting revenue
Write one problem faced by peasants under this system
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns about the role of zamindars

activities_projects.title: Peasant Life Description
activities_projects.objective: Understand the life of peasants under British rule
steps: Write three problems faced by peasants
Explain why they sometimes could not pay revenue
Write one effect of heavy taxes

activities_projects.title: Indigo Farming Observation
steps: Write what indigo was used for
Explain how peasants were forced to grow indigo
Write one problem faced by indigo farmers

activities_projects.title: Picture Observation Activity
steps: Look at a picture related to indigo farming in the chapter
Write what you see in the picture
Explain what it tells about the life of peasants

activities_projects.title: Timeline of Events
steps: Write the year Permanent Settlement was introduced
Write the year Indigo Revolt happened
Arrange them in chronological order

activities_projects.title: Short Note Writing
steps: Write a short note on indigo cultivation
Include where it was grown
Explain why peasants protested

activities_projects.title: Match the Following
steps: Write terms like zamindar, ryot, indigo
Write their meanings
Match the correct terms with definitions

activities_projects.title: Class Discussion on Indigo Revolt
activities_projects.objective: Understand the reasons for the Indigo Revolt
steps: Discuss why peasants protested against indigo planters
Write two reasons for the revolt
Write one outcome of the protest
